name: Verification Independence
description: At DAL A/B, verification of the development outputs is performed with independence.
rationale: DO-178C Annex A 'with independence' columns: a number of verification objectives must be satisfied with independence at Levels A and B.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
